strengths: 20 years of software engineering experience across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure) demonstrates breadth and adaptability
Founded GISCollective as open-source geospatial platform showing entrepreneurial drive and ability to build products used in production
Currently engaged in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, demonstrating recent hands-on exposure to AI/ML technologies
concerns: Limited demonstrated AI/ML expertise and product portfolio—recent exposure (April 2025) but no substantial previous AI projects or published AI work
Lacks preferred Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field; no evidence of advanced AI credentials or specialized ML knowledge
No clear director-level strategic leadership or organizational influence—resume shows strong individual contributor and staff-engineer roles but not strategic decision-making at organizational level
response.justification: Bogdan brings solid foundational software engineering across 20 years and demonstrates entrepreneurial capability through founding GISCollective. His current role shows recent engagement with AI infrastructure and MCP frameworks. However, the role explicitly requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI'—he lacks a substantial AI product portfolio, the preferred advanced degree in AI, and clear evidence of director-level strategic leadership or organizational influence needed to advise teams on cutting-edge AI adoption.
